title: Cozy At-Home Yoga and Meditation Corner with Warm Lighting
description: A serene and cozy living room corner designed for yoga and meditation featuring a blue yoga mat with cushions and a folded blanket, a comfortable armchair with a throw blanket, a wooden side table with lit candles, small indoor plants, and a steaming cup. The space is softly lit with warm natural light coming through a window, creating a peaceful wellness environment.
